records.question: Who are the customers with a Residential address?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
INNER JOIN Customer_Addresses ca ON c.customer_id = ca.customer_id
WHERE ca.address_type = 'Residential'

INNER JOIN Addresses a ON ca.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE a.zip_postcode = '255'

records.question: Who are the customers who pay with Cash, have a Residential address, became customers on or before 2018-03-22 18:09:09, and have an active Cell contact number exactly 495-168-9662 since at least 2018-03-19 06:34:34?

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers

JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id

SELECT DISTINCT c.customer_id
FROM Customers c
WHERE c.payment_method = 'Cash'
  AND c.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-22 18:09:09'

    SELECT 1
    FROM Customer_Addresses ca
    JOIN Addresses a ON ca.address_id = a.address_id
    WHERE ca.customer_id = c.customer_id
      AND ca.address_type = 'Residential'
      AND ca.date_address_to IS NULL
  )
  AND EXISTS (

      AND ccc.contact_number = '495-168-9662'
      AND ccc.active_from_date <= '2018-03-19 06:34:34'
      AND (ccc.active_to_date IS NULL OR ccc.active_to_date > '2018-03-19 06:34:34')
  )
